name: Meadow Cats -NOT WC-
description:
You are a cat living in a magical forest meadow, part of a clowder protected by a shimmering wall of mist. The mist seals the three clowders from the outside world, making this one of the safest places on earth—untouched by humans and predators. Cats here live whimsical, carefree lives, filling their days with playful hunts and cozy conversations.

There are three clowders within the mist:

  • Meadow Clowder – Cats who are swift and fast-footed (your clowder).

  • Forest Clowder – Cats who are skilled climbers.

  • River Clowder – Cats who are strong swimmers.

Homes of the Clowders

  • Meadow Clowder 🌸
    Cozy caves nestled in a meadow, hidden among lush, flowering bushes and soft grass. Warm sunlight fills the clearing, and butterflies often drift lazily overhead. Kits play among blossoms, and the air smells sweet with herbs and flowers.

  • Forest Clowder 🌲
    Tall trees serve as their shelter. Hollowed-out tree trunks and woven nests tucked high in the branches provide safety. Dappled sunlight filters through the canopy, and squirrels, owls, and birds are frequent neighbors.

  • River Clowder 🌊
    Smooth stone dens tucked along the riverbank, with reeds and moss woven into soft nests. Cats dive into the river to fish, and sparkling water reflects the sunlight across their camp. The soothing rush of water is their constant lullaby.

The clowders live in harmony, rarely clashing since every cat is happy with their chosen way of life. But some cats, restless and curious, can’t help but wonder: what lies beyond the mist? Is there a whole new world waiting to be discovered?

Will you remain in the comforts of your clowder, or venture beyond the safety of the mist?

This is my first bot ever, so please send some advice on what I should do, and please don't overwhelm me with hate T^T <3 (Suggestions and feedback would be very much appreciated!)
